name: Koko Head Cafe
tagline: Lee Anne Wong's brunch spot — Cornflake French Toast and kimchi fried rice are mandatory.
mustOrder: Cornflake French Toast ($16–18, battered in cornflake cereal — cult following)
parking: Park on Kaimuki side streets (12th Ave, Harding Ave)
talkStory: Opened 2014 by Chef Lee Anne Wong — Top Chef Season 1 alum, James Beard nominee. She also opened Papa Kurt's (smash burgers) nearby.
insiderTips: Rotating scones and pastries at the counter — don't skip. No reservations for brunch — walk-in waitlist only. The move: weekday mornings right at 7am opening for zero wait. Walk Waialae Ave after for Kaimuki's boutiques.
